metadata.summary: Template performance evidence bundle for PBPK MCP.
metadata.evidenceScope: Replace these rows with real model-specific evidence. Do not publish placeholder metrics as qualification evidence.
metadata.curator: Replace with model author or organization
notes: Runtime smoke rows should be kept distinct from observed-versus-predicted or external qualification rows.
Acceptance criteria should describe the exact comparison rule and threshold used for each row.

rows.acceptanceCriterion: Simulation executes and returns finite concentration-time output for the declared scenario.
notes: This row confirms runtime integrity only.
It must not be interpreted as predictive validation.

rows.acceptanceCriterion: Relative error <= 20% for the declared study, matrix, route, and metric definition.
rows.qualificationBasis: Observed-versus-predicted comparison against a declared benchmark dataset
notes: Replace numeric values and dataset ID with real benchmark content.
State route, matrix, life stage, and study conditions in accompanying documentation.

rows.acceptanceCriterion: Qualification package is reviewed and judged fit for the declared context of use.
rows.qualificationBasis: External qualification or regulatory review package
notes: Only include this row when a real external qualification package exists.
